metadata.title: Declaration Regarding Service of Declaration of Disclosure and Income and Expense Declaration
metadata.author: Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann
metadata.copyright: © 2024–2026 Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann. All Rights Reserved.

fields.guidance_en: Enter the case number from the Petition.
fields.guidance_es: Ingrese el número de caso de la Petición.
fields.guidance_zh: 输入请愿书的案件编号。

options: I served my preliminary declaration on the date shown below
My preliminary declaration was served by another person
fields.guidance_en: Confirm service of your preliminary Declaration of Disclosure (FL-140) and attachments. Must be served within 60 days of filing the petition or response.
fields.guidance_es: Confirme la notificación de su Declaración de Divulgación preliminar (FL-140) y adjuntos.
fields.guidance_zh: 确认已送达您的初步披露声明（FL-140）及附件。

options: Final declaration was waived per FAM §2105
fields.guidance_en: Confirm service of final Declaration of Disclosure or indicate parties agreed to waive under FAM §2105. Both must sign FL-144 if waiving.
fields.guidance_es: Confirme la notificación de la Declaración de Divulgación final o indique que las partes acordaron renunciar.
fields.guidance_zh: 确认已送达最终披露声明或表明双方同意放弃。

fields.guidance_en: Enter the date you served (or had served) each declaration on the other party.
fields.guidance_es: Ingrese la fecha en que notificó cada declaración a la otra parte.
fields.guidance_zh: 输入您向对方送达每份声明的日期。
